name: games-by-alexmaster
description: Full-stack кинематографичный каталог пройденных игр (React + Elysia + Drizzle + SQLite)

scripts.setup: bun run install:all && bun run db:reset
scripts.install:all: cd backend && bun install && cd ../frontend && bun install
scripts.db:reset: cd backend && bun run db:generate && bun run db:migrate && bun run db:seed
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "cd backend && bun run dev" "cd frontend && bun run dev"
